name: Chicken & Chinese Chive Shu-Mei
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all filling ingredients together until well combined.
2. Place about 3/4 cup of the filling in the center of each wrapper.
3. Bring up the corners to form a "money bag" shape, leaving the top open.
4. Blanch whole chives briefly in hot tap water and wrap one around each dumpling for decoration.
5. Steam the dumplings in an oiled bamboo steamer over high heat for 15 minutes.
